center.name: 康塞普西翁省 (巴拉圭)
center.summary: 康塞普西翁省 (巴拉圭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Blaze-winged parakeet、金领金刚鹦鹉、Planalto foliage-gleaner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blaze-winged parakeet is found in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul and in northeastern Paraguay's Alto Paraguay and Concepción departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The planalto foliage-gleaner is found in the southern planalto from Brazil's Mato Grosso state east to Bahia and south to Paraná and eastern Paraguay's Concepción and Amambay departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The main population occurs in the Pantanal of Brazil (south-western Mato Grosso, western Mato Grosso do Sul and southern Rondônia), northern Argentina (eastern Jujuy and northern Salta), far northern Paraguay (Alto Paraguay and Concepción) and most of northern and eastern Bolivia (Beni, Santa Cruz, Chuquisaca and Tarija)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blaze-winged parakeet is found in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul and in northeastern Paraguay's Alto Paraguay and Concepción departments
